use_cases: Display status labels on content items
Show category tags on cards and list items
Use as selection indicators in forms
Mark items with count or numeric values
ai_summary: A reusable Badge component from shadcn/ui with configurable variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline). Supports standard HTML div attributes and integrates with Tailwind CSS via class-variance-authority. Designed for displaying status labels, category tags, or selection indicators in SaaS and general web applications. Clean, accessible implementation with focus ring support.
